0:
Lisette de Valentione seeks the assistance of an experienced adventurer in her labors of love.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Lisette de Valentione seeks the assistance of an experienced adventurer in her labors of love.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Lisette de Valentione and her band of loyal retainers have once again journeyed from Ishgard to bring the passionate spirit of their noble house's motto─<Emphasis>ardor and affection</Emphasis>─to all Eorzea. However, in their efforts to aid those Eorzeans unable to confess their love in person, the party has met with an unforeseen obstacle that only an experienced adventurer can overcome. Lisette bids you speak with Hortefense, the man spearheading the mission, to learn more.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
